signals.content_en: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This may affect China's exports of electronics and other goods to the U.S. and global markets due to supply chain scrutiny.
signals.content_zh: 美国贸易代表办公室发起强迫劳动301调查并拟加征关税，可能影响中国电子产品等对美及全球出口，供应链审查风险上升。

checklist.desc: Prepare commercial invoice, packing list, contract, and export license slots for general electronics.
Run China export control and cryptography reviews for wireless/secure computing features.
Review supply chain for any forced labor allegations; prepare documentation to demonstrate compliance.
Ensure accurate origin documentation to avoid transshipment or circumvention claims.
Evaluate potential tariff increases under Section 301 and adjust pricing or sourcing strategies.

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce has eased export controls for the UAE, reducing licensing requirements for certain items. This change may affect US export controls and entity list screening for UAE-bound shipments.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部放宽了对阿联酋的出口管制，减少了某些物项的许可要求。此变更可能影响对阿联酋出口的美国出口管制和实体清单筛查。

checklist.desc: Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Run restricted party and export control screening; retain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.

signals.content_en: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions.
signals.content_zh: 应用材料公司因非法向中国出口半导体制造设备，违反BIS出口管制和实体清单限制，同意支付2.52亿美元罚款。

checklist.desc: 确认设备ECCN编码，评估是否受EAR管制及是否需要出口许可证。
对最终用户和最终用途进行实体清单筛查，确保不涉及受限方。
获取并保留最终用户和最终用途声明，确保合规。
评估设备HTS编码是否受Section 301附加关税影响，并计算税率。
如设备含无线功能，确认FCC Part 15/18认证及供应商FCC ID。

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufacturing equipment. Exporters must now demonstrate that items are not destined for military end-use or entities on the Entity List.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部修订了对华出口半导体的许可证审查政策，加强了对先进芯片及相关制造设备的管控。出口商必须证明产品不会用于军事最终用途或出口至实体清单上的实体。

checklist.desc: Screen all parties against the BIS Entity List and Denied Persons List; retain screening records.
Obtain and review end-user statements to confirm no military or prohibited end-use.
Prepare and submit license applications for controlled semiconductors under revised BIS policy.
Classify items under correct HTS code and assess Section 301 tariff exposure.
Ensure wireless semiconductors have FCC Part 15/18 certification or supplier declaration.
Determine ECCN and confirm if items are subject to revised license review policy.

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms. This change may affect licensing requirements for certain firearms exports.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部撤销了拜登时期的枪支规定，恢复了对民用枪支出口管制的常识性做法。这一变化可能影响某些枪支出口的许可要求。

checklist.desc: 确认产品ECCN编码，评估是否受EAR管辖及许可例外适用性。
对最终用户和最终用途进行实体清单筛查，保留筛查记录。
确认HTS编码是否涉及Section 301附加关税，计算总税率。
如产品含无线功能，确认FCC Part 15/18认证及供应商FCC ID。

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce has expanded the Entity List to cover affiliates of listed entities. This action broadens the scope of restricted parties, requiring enhanced due diligence for any transaction involving entities owned or controlled by listed parties. Exporters must verify end-users and end-uses, especially for semiconductor and electronic components, to avoid violations.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部将实体清单扩展至涵盖被列实体的关联公司。此举扩大了受限方的范围，要求对涉及被列方拥有或控制的实体的任何交易进行更严格的尽职调查。出口商必须核实最终用户和最终用途，特别是半导体和电子元件，以避免违规。

checklist.desc: Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Run restricted party and export control screening; retain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.
Identify any affiliates of Entity List parties in your supply chain; verify ownership and control structures.
Obtain signed end-use statements from all US consignees, especially for items with dual-use potential.
Re-classify items under EAR to ensure correct ECCN and determine if a license is required for Entity List affiliates.

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce closed a loophole that allowed foreign-owned semiconductor fabs in China to bypass U.S. export controls. This action expands BIS jurisdiction over certain foreign-produced items and increases compliance obligations for exporters of semiconductor manufacturing equipment and related technology to China.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部堵住了允许外国在华半导体晶圆厂规避美国出口管制的漏洞。此举扩大了BIS对某些外国生产物品的管辖权，增加了向中国出口半导体制造设备及相关技术的合规义务。

checklist.desc: 确认产品ECCN编码，评估是否受新增外国直接产品规则管辖，并检查是否涉及实体清单最终用户。

checklist.task: 最终用户与最终用途声明
checklist.desc: 获取并保留中国境内半导体晶圆厂的最终用户和最终用途声明，确保不涉及军事或敏感用途。
对交易各方进行实体清单和SDN清单筛查，确保无受限方参与。
根据HTS编码确认是否适用Section 301附加关税，并计算总税率。
如产品含无线功能，确认FCC Part 15/18认证状态，并准备FCC ID文件。
